channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 4%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer vows ‘to fight to win’ against Streeting for Labour leadership with health secretary poised to quit government
item.description: Starmer vows ‘to fight to win’ against Streeting for Labour leadership with health secretary poised to quit government

item.title: FT UK Politics: Starmer prepares to fight leadership bid by Streeting
item.description: Starmer prepares to fight leadership bid by Streeting

item.title: The Guardian: Wes Streeting prepares to launch leadership challenge against Keir Starmer - The Guardian
item.description: Wes Streeting prepares to launch leadership challenge against Keir Starmer - The Guardian

item.title: The Guardian: King’s speech might be the last word on Starmer as reluctant monarch does his duty | John Crace - The Guardian
item.description: King’s speech might be the last word on Starmer as reluctant monarch does his duty | John Crace - The Guardian

item.title:
Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: Andy Burnham has told Labour MPs they should hold the line and that he has options to return to parliament after several seats identified by his allies failed to materialise.
Two seats seem possible - Afzal Khan’s i...
item.description:
Andy Burnham has told Labour MPs they should hold the line and that he has options to return to parliament after several seats identified by his allies failed to materialise.
Two seats seem possible - Afzal Khan’s i...

item.title: The Guardian: Who would be in Wes Streeting’s corner if he ran for the Labour leadership? - The Guardian
item.description: Who would be in Wes Streeting’s corner if he ran for the Labour leadership? - The Guardian

item.title: Novara Media: Revealed: ‘WesForLeader’ Website Updated on Monday Night
item.description: Revealed: ‘WesForLeader’ Website Updated on Monday Night

item.title: The Guardian: ‘Hold the line’: Burnham tells allies in parliament he still has options to return - The Guardian
item.description: ‘Hold the line’: Burnham tells allies in parliament he still has options to return - The Guardian

item.title: The Guardian: Wes Streeting: PM-in-waiting or ‘this generation’s David Miliband’? - The Guardian
item.description: Wes Streeting: PM-in-waiting or ‘this generation’s David Miliband’? - The Guardian

item.title: BBC Politics: Who's in Wales' first ever Plaid Cymru government?
item.description: Who's in Wales' first ever Plaid Cymru government?
